description: Tiny offline seeds for the bounded SQLite recommender path.

cases.failure_mode: Action/crime seeds should prefer shared cast or genre over unrelated high-level fallback titles.
cases.notes: Midnight Crew shares action, crime, and Mara Vale; Crime Alley shares crime.

cases.failure_mode: Sci-fi/adventure recommendations should not be displaced by unrelated comedy/romance titles.
cases.notes: Galaxy Chase shares sci-fi, adventure, and Noah Reed; Deep Space Laughs shares sci-fi.

cases.expected_error: This movie is not in the dataset.
cases.failure_mode: Unknown titles should be reported as expected failures instead of crashing the harness.
cases.notes: Keeps the report honest about lookup failures.
